title: CAR MODEL detail page » PROGRAMME EPISODES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the CAR MODEL detail page to show all connected PROGRAMME EPISODES
So I can ...
description:
* The CAR MODEL detail page contains a section with a list of all connected PROGRAMME EPISODES.
* Each PROGRAMME EPISODE in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each PROGRAMME EPISODE in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each PROGRAMME EPISODE in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no PROGRAMME EPISODE connected to the CAR MODEL then the section is not displayed at all.
